raw.subject: Your Lancaster page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the rustic touches in your Lancaster storefront photos - they really give potential customers a sense of your spa's personality. 

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're losing out on bookings and calls from people who want to experience your upscale beauty services in person. 

I sketched up a homepage idea that incorporates your services menu, work gallery, and a prominent booking CTA - all inspired by the content you already share on Facebook. The hero headline is even a nod to your Lancaster roots.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-v-nails-spa-lancaster

If you're interested in learning more about bringing this online, I'd be happy to discuss the details and costs involved - I work with local businesses to create simple, flat-fee websites that help them thrive. Feel free to reply or give me a quick call to get started.
